description: Allow the Harborline Toolbox tray popup AND the dual-surface main window to receive native events (appearance changes, toolbox-navigate deep-links) and read the app version. Tauri v2's ACL is empty-by-default with no capabilities/ directory (verified: gen/schemas/capabilities.json resolves to {} on this base), which silently denies core:event listeners on EVERY window -- including the popup's own existing ThemeProvider appearance-changed listener, not just the new toolbox window (design-review/code-review PR #103 finding V1). The app's own #[tauri::command] handlers (get_fleet, open_toolbox, etc.) are custom commands registered via invoke_handler, not plugin commands -- they are outside the ACL/permission manifest entirely (verified: gen/schemas/acl-manifests.json has no per-app-command entries) and are invokable regardless of this file; only the core:event plugin (listen/unlisten) and the core:app plugin (`getVersion`, used by the Toolbox main window's honest navigation-panel footer -- CIC amendment, fix pass 2 parity item 7) require an explicit grant.
